system.description:
The fyceline torch integrated into a servo-harness is identical to an Astartes flamer. This auxiliary limb can lay down a stream of incendiary fuel while the Techmarine's hands remain free for other tasks.

Note: This weapon is part of a servo-harness and requires the Astartes Servo-Harness cybernetic to be equipped. The Techmarine may use his Reaction to make a single shot with this weapon.
